name: HWR_CAT_TOPIC_B
description: The topic table is used to store tags/topics for a user and category.

columns.Name: TOPIC_ID
columns.Comments: This column holds the primary key for this table

columns.Name: CATEGORY_ID
columns.Comments: The category id. This is a foreign key from the category tables.

columns.Name: CATEGORY_KEY
columns.Comments: This column holds the category_key from the category table

columns.Name: TOPIC_KEY
columns.Comments: This column holds the topic key for this table

columns.Name: AVERAGE_SCORE
columns.Comments: This column stores average calculated score for the skill specified

columns.Name: URL_LINK
columns.Comments: This column stores the url lik to the website that best teaches the skill set specified

columns.Name: IS_SEEDED_DATA
columns.Comments: A flag indicating seeded data. Use Y for seeded data or N for customer data

columns.Name: ACCURACY_VALUE
columns.Comments: This is the ACCURACY score for this topic.

columns.Name: IMPORTANCE_VALUE
columns.Comments: This is the IMPORTANCE score for this topic.

columns.Name: PRECISION_VALUE
columns.Comments: This is the PRECISION score for this topic.

columns.Name: RELEVANCE_VALUE
columns.Comments: This is the RELEVANCE score for this topic.

columns.Name: IS_ACTIVE
columns.Comments: A flag indicating active topics to be used. Use Y for true (active) or N for false (not active)

columns.Name: SEED_DATA_SOURCE
columns.Comments: Source of seed data record. A value of 'BULK_SEED_DATA_SCRIPT' indicates that record was bulk loaded. Otherwise, specifies the name of the seed data file.

columns.Name: CREATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who created the row.

columns.Name: CREATION_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the creation of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the last update of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the session login associated to the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: ORA_SEED_SET1
columns.Comments: Oracle internal use only. Indicates the edition-based redefinition (EBR) context of the row for SET1. Context values are Y or N.

columns.Name: ORA_SEED_SET2
columns.Comments: Oracle internal use only. Indicates the edition-based redefinition (EBR) context of the row for SET2. Context values are Y or N.
